      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/access/opinion/gig-workers-taxation-invisible-workforce-india-platforms-gst-oecd-niti-aayog-19851584.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[While passenger transport booked through e-commerce platforms is taxed at five percent GST, local delivery services attract an eighteen percent rate, albeit with input tax credit. This disparity raises concerns over tax neutrality, as both services are provided by similarly placed gig workers via digital platforms and should, in principle, face comparable tax treatment, notes former bureaucrat Siddharth Jain.]]></description>
